recommendations.title: Wish Upon
recommendations.overview: A teenage girl discovers a box with magical powers, but those powers comes with a deadly price.

recommendations.title: The Silence
recommendations.overview: With the world under attack by deadly creatures who hunt by sound, a teen and her family seek refuge outside the city and encounter a mysterious cult.

recommendations.title: Annabelle
recommendations.overview: A couple begins to experience terrifying supernatural occurrences involving a vintage doll shortly after their home is invaded by satanic cultists.

recommendations.title: Wolves at the Door

recommendations.title: The Butterfly Effect 2
recommendations.overview: After his girlfriend, Julie, and two best friends are killed in a tragic auto accident, Nick struggles to cope with his loss and grief. Suffering from migraine-like seizures, Nick soon discovers that he has the power to change the past via his memori

recommendations.title: Test
recommendations.overview: Kurt Longson tries to avenge his daughters death. To succeed he has to battle with his conscience and morality to realize true love.

recommendations.title: Godzilla vs. Kong
recommendations.overview: In a time when monsters walk the Earth, humanity’s fight for its future sets Godzilla and Kong on a collision course that will see the two most powerful forces of nature on the planet collide in a spectacular battle for the ages.

recommendations.title: Day Shift
recommendations.overview: An LA vampire hunter has a week to come up with the cash to pay for his kid's tuition and braces. Trying to make a living these days just might kill him.

recommendations.title: Transformers: Rise of the Beasts
recommendations.overview: When a new threat capable of destroying the entire planet emerges, Optimus Prime and the Autobots must team up with a powerful faction known as the Maximals. With the fate of humanity hanging in the balance, humans Noah and Elena will do whatever it

recommendations.title: Mortal Kombat Legends: Battle of the Realms
recommendations.overview: The Earthrealm heroes must journey to the Outworld and fight for the survival of their homeland, invaded by the forces of evil warlord Shao Kahn, in the tournament to end all tournaments: the final Mortal Kombat.
